title: EarlyUpdate: Pale Garden
description: Adding Things from the Next Updates,Blocks,Items and Mobs.Updating Each Minecraft Live!
body:
a mod that adds things from the next update showcased in minecraft live!

 

THIS IS NOT A BACKPORT MOD!!!

for the trial chambers, use this mod {trial chambers 1.20.1 backport}

This Mod Currently Adds

 

Pale Garden Version:

- Pale Garden
A Desaturated forest with a grayscaled oak wood and pale moss, that nearly spawns hostile mobs and no peaceful mob, creakings spawn here at night next to creaking hearts

 

- Pale Oak Wood
A Grayscaled wood with all things you can make with wood (except signs and boats) also includes the creaking heart

 

- Creaking Heart

a block that generates in small blobs in trees of the pale garden, spawns creakings only when its night time and a pale oak log is below and above, breaking it kills all creakings in a 15 blocks area (controlled by config). only drops itself with a silk touch axe, else it will drop a normal pale oak log.

 

- Creaking
A New ScArYyYyYyYyYy mob that spawns in the pale garden at night, moves fast when you dont look at it, and can be killed by breaking the creaking heart or using potions, drowning, explosion, and fire.

Deals 6 damage, haves 35 health, xp and drops can be enabled by config.

It also kill villagers and illagers.

 

- Pale Moss and Pale Moss Block
two grayscaled moss blocks that spawns in the pale garden, the pale moss grows itself to the nearest block when placed

 

Trial Version:

- Copper and Tuff Blocks!

Tuff Bricks,Copper Bulbs,Trial Spawners, Copper Trapdoors,Copper Grids,Polished Tuff, and all variants like waxed and oxidized for example.

 

- Armadillo

the winner mob vote mob,Found in Savanna Biome. it haves a scute item, the scute drops when you hit it with hand or when the armadillo is killed

 

- The Breeze

a new mob from the minecraft live,that shoots wind into the player,found in trial chambers into trial spawners.

 

- Trial Chambers

Dungeons made of copper and tuff, with loot,spawners and the breeze, you can find trial chambers into the caves of forests,birch forests,dark forests,sunflower plains,flower forests,and plains.
